D:\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\libzmq.dir/objects.a
D:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\libzmq.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\libzmq.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\mingw64\bin\g++.exe  -std=c++11 -Wno-tautological-constant-compare -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -o bin\libzmq.dll -Wl,--out-implib,lib\libzmq.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,5,--minor-image-version,2 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\libzmq.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\libzmq.dir\linkLibs.rsp
